base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of coin_spin — a pickup_item (currency) from 1985 super mario bros. front face / edge (narrow strip) / back face / edge (mirror). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame coin rotation — front face / edge (narrow strip) / back face / edge (mirror); creates the iconic spinning-gold illusion
